===== pt_dates.py =====
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Auto-detect safe END_DATE for paper-trade sims.

Returns min of (today-1, lagged_pos_ov max, 5state max, BQ ticker max).
intraday_full.pkl is NOT a hard cap — sim falls back to T+1 Open when missing.
"""
import os, pickle
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
START_DATE = "2026-04-01"  # paper-trade window start (canonical)


def detect_end_date(bq_check=False) -> str:
    cands = [pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date()) - pd.Timedelta(days=1)]
    try:
        with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "lagged_pos_ov.pkl"), "rb") as f:
            ov = pickle.load(f)
        cands.append(pd.to_datetime(ov["time"]).max())
    except Exception:
        pass
    if bq_check:
        try:
            import subprocess
            r = subprocess.run(
                ["bq", "query", "--use_legacy_sql=false",
                 "--project_id=[REDACTED]", "--format=csv",
                 "SELECT MAX(s.time) FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s"],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
            lines = [l for l in r.stdout.splitlines() if l and not l.startswith("f0_")]
            if lines:
                cands.append(pd.Timestamp(lines[0]))
        except Exception:
            pass
    return min(cands).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"START_DATE={START_DATE}")
    print(f"END_DATE={detect_end_date(bq_check=True)}")

===== papertrade_daily.bat =====
@echo off
REM Daily paper-trade orchestrator — runs 4 sims + comparison.
REM Triggered by Windows Task Scheduler at 15:30 daily.
REM Logs each run to data\papertrade_run_YYYY-MM-DD.log
REM
REM Updated 2026-05-27:
REM  - Removed pt_v12_live (V3 alt state test, no longer needed)
REM  - UPGRADED V11: KELLY ETF + DT_10_25_25 state (validated +1.90pp Full CAGR)
REM  - Renamed versions to architecture-based names for clarity:
REM    V11        = Song Sinh (BAL+VN30) + KELLY + DT_10_25_25  ⭐ upgraded
REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE
REM    V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL parking {3:1.0}

setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\papertrade_run_%TODAY%.log

cd /d "%WORKDIR%"

echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
echo Paper-trade daily run (4 systems) — %DATE% %TIME%    >> "%LOGFILE%"
echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"

echo [1/5] pt_v11_tq34b.py        (V11 = Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v11_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [2/5] pt_v12_tq34b.py        (V12 = Am Duong: BAL+LAGGED)        >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v12_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [3/5] pt_v121_ensemble.py    (V121_ENS: V12.1 + Ensemble + BASE) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ensemble.py                                             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [4/5] pt_v121_ens_q2.py      (V121_Kelly: V121_ENS + Kelly)      >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ens_q2.py                                               >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5/5] papertrade_compare.py  (4-system comparison)               >> "%LOGFILE%"
python papertrade_compare.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo Done %TIME%                                                       >> "%LOGFILE%"
endlocal

content.text:
Now I have the full picture. The running batch (`papertrade_daily.bat`) has 4 systems: **V11 (already DT+KELLY), V12 (TQ34b+BASE), V121_ENS, V121_Kelly**. So among non-ensemble systems, V11 is *already* on DT — the one still on TQ34b is **V12**. The live A/B to set up is therefore V12+DT4 vs the running V12+TQ34b.

Let me read the rest of pt_v12_tq34b.py to clone it accurately with a DT-4gate state swap.

88	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
89	# 2. Load BA v11 signals + filters
90	# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
91	print("\n[2] Loading v10 signals + Release_Date + 5-state + overheat + D1 override...")
92	sig = bq(SIGNAL_V10.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
93	sig["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
94	print(f"  signals: {len(sig):,} rows")
95	
96	rel = bq(f"""SELECT tf.ticker, tf.Release_Date FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS tf
97	WHERE tf.Release_Date BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
98	rel["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(rel["Release_Date"])
99	rel_by_tk = rel.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).groupby("ticker")["Release_Date"].apply(list).to_dict()
100	ds_arr = np.empty(len(sig))
101	for i,(tk,t) in enumerate(zip(sig["ticker"].values, sig["time"].values)):
102	    arr = rel_by_tk.get(tk)
103	    if not arr: ds_arr[i]=np.nan; continue
104	    idx = bisect.bisect_right(arr, pd.Timestamp(t))
105	    ds_arr[i] = np.nan if idx==0 else (pd.Timestamp(t)-arr[idx-1]).days
106	sig["days_since_release"] = ds_arr
107	
108	state_df = bq(f"""SELECT s.time, s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s
109	WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
110	state_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(state_df["time"])
111	state_by_date = dict(zip(state_df["time"], state_df["state"]))
112	
113	vni_full = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close, t.MA200, t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
114	WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
115	vni_full["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni_full["time"])
116	vni_full["ratio"] = vni_full["Close"]/vni_full["MA200"]
117	vni_full["state"] = vni_full["time"].map(state_by_date)
118	vni_full["overheat"] = (vni_full["ratio"]>1.30) & ((vni_full["state"]==5)|(vni_full["D_RSI"]>0.75))
119	overheat_dates = set(vni_full[vni_full["overheat"]]["time"])
120	
121	sig["state"] = sig["time"].map(state_by_date)
122	
123	# D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY override
124	d1 = bq(f"""
125	WITH adv_dated AS (
126	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time,
127	    SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0, NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
128	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
129	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
130	),
131	fa_dated AS (
132	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
133	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
134	  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
135	),
136	fin_dated AS (
137	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
138	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
139	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
140	)
141	SELECT t.ticker, t.time, fa.fa_tier,
142	  SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,
143	  fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy, adv.adv_yoy, s5.state AS state5
144	FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
145	LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s5 ON s5.time = t.time
146	LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
147	LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
148	LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
149	WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
150	  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
151	""")
152	d1["time"] = pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 2. Load BA v11 signals + filters
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[2] Loading v10 signals + Release_Date + 5-state + overheat + D1 override...")
sig = bq(SIGNAL_V10.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
sig["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
print(f"  signals: {len(sig):,} rows")

rel = bq(f"""SELECT tf.ticker, tf.Release_Date FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS tf
WHERE tf.Release_Date BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
rel["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(rel["Release_Date"])
rel_by_tk = rel.sort_values(["ticker","Release_Date"]).groupby("ticker")["Release_Date"].apply(list).to_dict()
ds_arr = np.empty(len(sig))
for i,(tk,t) in enumerate(zip(sig["ticker"].values, sig["time"].values)):
    arr = rel_by_tk.get(tk)
    if not arr: ds_arr[i]=np.nan; continue
    idx = bisect.bisect_right(arr, pd.Timestamp(t))
    ds_arr[i] = np.nan if idx==0 else (pd.Timestamp(t)-arr[idx-1]).days
sig["days_since_release"] = ds_arr

state_df = bq(f"""SELECT s.time, s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s
WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
state_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(state_df["time"])
state_by_date = dict(zip(state_df["time"], state_df["state"]))

vni_full = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close, t.MA200, t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")
vni_full["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni_full["time"])
vni_full["ratio"] = vni_full["Close"]/vni_full["MA200"]
vni_full["state"] = vni_full["time"].map(state_by_date)
vni_full["overheat"] = (vni_full["ratio"]>1.30) & ((vni_full["state"]==5)|(vni_full["D_RSI"]>0.75))
overheat_dates = set(vni_full[vni_full["overheat"]]["time"])

sig["state"] = sig["time"].map(state_by_date)

# D1 RE_BACKLOG_BUY override
d1 = bq(f"""
WITH adv_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0, NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
),
fa_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
),
fin_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
)
SELECT t.ticker, t.time, fa.fa_tier,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,
  fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy, adv.adv_yoy, s5.state AS state5
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s5 ON s5.time = t.time
LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
""")
d1["time"] = pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])
d1_mask = (d1["adv_yoy"].notna() & (d1["adv_yoy"]>0.5) & d1["fa_tier"].isin(["C","D"])
           & d1["state5"].isin([3,4,5])
           & ((d1["np_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0) | (d1["rev_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)))
d1_q = d1.loc[d1_mask,["ticker","time"]].assign(_d1_ok=True)
sig = sig.merge(d1_q, on=["ticker","time"], how="left")
omask = sig["_d1_ok"].fillna(False) & (sig["ta"]>=120)
sig.loc[omask,"play_type"] = "RE_BACKLOG_BUY"
sig = sig.drop(columns=["_d1_ok"])

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s = row["state"]; days = row["days_since_release"]
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s = int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s == 1: return pd.notna(days) and days<=30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days<=60
    return True
mb = sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
mk = (~mb) | sig.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)
sig_f = sig[mk].copy()
mp3 = sig_f["time"].isin(overheat_dates) & sig_f["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
sig_f.loc[mp3,"play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
print(f"  D1 reclassified: {int(omask.sum())}; SV_TIGHT filtered: {int((mb & ~sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)).sum())}; P3 blocked: {int(mp3.sum())}")

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 3. Common data (prices, opens, sec_map, ETF prices, state ff)
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[3] Loading prices/Open/sector/E1VFVN30...")
opens_df = bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
  AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
opens_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
open_prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk,g in sig_f.groupby("ticker")}
liq_map = {(r["ticker"],r["time"]): r["liq"] for _,r in sig_f.iterrows()}

vni = bq(VNI_QUERY.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(vni["time"].unique())

etf_real = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t

vn30_underlying = dict(zip(etf_real["time"], etf_real["Close"]))

state_ff = {}; last_s=None
for d in vni_dates:

input.old_string:
state_df = bq(f"""SELECT s.time, s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s
WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'""")

input.new_string:
# ── DT 4-gate (= DT_10_25_25 canonical) computed causally from TQ34b ──
# 4 independent confirmation gates. Pull FULL 2014+ TQ34b history for proper
# warmup, apply the causal commitment filter, then slice to the paper window.
def _dt_4gate(states_arr, default=10, enC=25, exC=10, enX=25, exX=10):
    out = states_arr.copy(); committed = states_arr[0]; ps, pr = states_arr[0], 1
    for t in range(1, len(states_arr)):
        s = states_arr[t]
        if s == ps: pr += 1
        else: ps, pr = s, 1
        if ps == committed:
            out[t] = committed; continue
        need = (enC if ps == 1 else enX if ps == 5
                else exC if committed == 1 else exX if committed == 5 else default)
        if pr >= need: committed = ps
        out[t] = committed
    return out

state_full = bq(f"""SELECT s.time, s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s
WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '2014-01-01' AND DATE '{END_DATE}' ORDER BY s.time""")
state_full["time"] = pd.to_datetime(state_full["time"])
state_full = state_full.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
state_full["state_dt"] = _dt_4gate(state_full["state"].values.astype(int))

# ── DT 4-gate (= DT_10_25_25 canonical) computed causally from TQ34b ──
# 4 independent confirmation gates. Pull FULL 2014+ TQ34b history for proper
# warmup, apply the causal commitment filter, then slice to the paper window.
def _dt_4gate(states_arr, default=10, enC=25, exC=10, enX=25, exX=10):
    out = states_arr.copy(); committed = states_arr[0]; ps, pr = states_arr[0], 1
    for t in range(1, len(states_arr)):
        s = states_arr[t]
        if s == ps: pr += 1
        else: ps, pr = s, 1
        if ps == committed:
            out[t] = committed; continue
        need = (enC if ps == 1 else enX if ps == 5
                else exC if committed == 1 else exX if committed == 5 else default)
        if pr >= need: committed = ps
        out[t] = committed
    return out

WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '2014-01-01' AND DATE '{END_DATE}' ORDER BY s.time""")

state_full = state_full.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
state_full["state_dt"] = _dt_4gate(state_full["state"].values.astype(int))

1	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
2	"""Paper-trade comparison report — 4 systems side-by-side.
3	
4	Updated 2026-05-27:
5	  - Removed V3 (pt_v12_live) — alt state test no longer needed
6	  - Renamed to architecture-based names (V11 / V12 / V121_ENS / V121_Kelly)
7	
8	Reads:
9	  data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv     (V11        = Song Sinh: BAL+VN30 + TQ34b)
10	  data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv     (V12        = Âm Dương: BAL+LAGGED + TQ34b)
11	  data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv      (V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble M1+M3r AND-HOLD + BASE)
12	  data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv   (V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0})
13	
14	Plus VNINDEX from BQ for the same window as a passive benchmark.
15	
16	Writes:
17	  data/papertrade_compare5.md    — markdown comparison report
18	  data/papertrade_compare5.csv   — daily NAV/return for all 4 + VNI
19	"""
20	import os, sys, io, datetime as dt
21	import numpy as np
22	import pandas as pd
23	
24	sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
25	WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
26	sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
27	os.chdir(WORKDIR)
28	from simulate_holistic_nav import bq
29	
30	SYSTEMS = [
31	    ("V11",         "V11 Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25 ⭐",     "data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv"),
32	    ("V12",         "V12 Âm Dương (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b",         "data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv"),
33	    ("V121_ENS",    "V12.1 Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + BASE",   "data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv"),
34	    ("V121_Kelly",  "V12.1 Ensemble + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0}",     "data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv"),
35	]
36	
37	
38	def vni_series(start: str, end: str) -> pd.Series:
39	    df = bq(f"SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t "
40	            f"WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}' "
41	            f"ORDER BY t.time")
42	    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
43	    return df.set_index("time")["Close"]
44	
45	
46	def stats(nav: pd.Series) -> dict:
47	    nav = nav.dropna()
48	    if len(nav) < 2: return {}
49	    ret_total = nav.iloc[-1]/nav.iloc[0] - 1
50	    days = (nav.index[-1] - nav.index[0]).days
51	    years = days / 365.25
52	    cagr = (1+ret_total)**(1/years) - 1 if years > 0 else 0
53	    daily_ret = nav.pct_change().dropna()
54	    vol_ann = daily_ret.std() * np.sqrt(252)
55	    sharpe = (daily_ret.mean()*252)/vol_ann if vol_ann > 0 else 0
56	    peak = nav.cummax()
57	    dd = (nav-peak)/peak
58	    max_dd = dd.min()
59	    calmar = cagr/abs(max_dd) if max_dd < 0 else float("nan")
60	    return {"start": nav.index[0].date(), "end": nav.index[-1].date(),
61	            "days": days, "init": nav.iloc[0], "final": nav.iloc[-1],
62	            "ret_total": ret_total, "cagr": cagr, "vol_ann": vol_ann,
63	            "sharpe": sharpe, "max_dd": max_dd, "calmar": calmar}
64	
65	
66	def main():
67	    rows = {}
68	    nav_all = {}
69	    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
70	        full = os.path.join(WORKDIR, path)
71	        if not os.path.exists(full):
72	            print(f"  MISSING: {full}"); continue
73	        df = pd.read_csv(full, parse_dates=["ymd"]).sort_values("ymd")
74	        nav = df.set_index("ymd")["nav"]
75	        nav_all[key] = nav
76	        s = stats(nav); s["name"] = name; rows[key] = s
77	
78	    if not rows:
79	        print("No logs found. Run pt_v11_tq34b.py / pt_v12_tq34b.py / pt_v12_live.py first.")
80	        return
81	
82	    # VNI benchmark over same window
83	    first = min(s["start"] for s in rows.values())
84	    last  = max(s["end"]   for s in rows.values())
85	    try:
86	        vni = vni_series(first.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), last.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))
87	        # rebase to 50B at first day
88	        vni_nav = (vni / vni.iloc[0]) * 50e9
89	        nav_all["VNI_BH"] = vni_nav
90	        rows["VNI_BH"] = {**stats(vni_nav), "name": "VNINDEX Buy & Hold (rebased 50B)"}
91	    except Exception as e:
92	        print(f"  VNI load failed: {e}")
93	
94	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
95	    # Write markdown
96	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
97	    now = dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
98	    md = []
99	    md.append(f"# Paper-Trade Comparison — 5 Systems\n")
100	    md.append(f"*Generated: {now}*\n")
101	    md.append(f"*Window: {first} → {last} ({(last-first).days} calendar days)*\n")
102	    md.append(f"*Init NAV: 50B VND fresh, all-cash, no positions (each system)*\n\n")
103	
104	    md.append("## Headline metrics\n")
105	    md.append("| System | Final NAV | Total Ret | CAGR | Vol (ann) | Sharpe | Max DD | Calmar |")
106	    md.append("|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
107	    keys_order = ["V11","V12","V121_ENS","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]
108	    for k in keys_order:
109	        if k not in rows: continue
110	        s = rows[k]
111	        md.append(f"| **{s['name']}** | {s['final']/1e9:.3f}B | "
112	                  f"{s['ret_total']*100:+.2f}% | {s['cagr']*100:+.2f}% | "
113	                  f"{s['vol_ann']*100:.2f}% | {s['sharpe']:+.2f} | "
114	                  f"{s['max_dd']*100:+.2f}% | {s['calmar']:+.2f} |")
115	    md.append("")
116	
117	    # Delta vs V121_ENS (leading backtest winner, baseline for Kelly overlay)
118	    if "V121_ENS" in rows:
119	        ref_ret = rows["V121_ENS"]["ret_total"]
120	        ref_dd  = rows["V121_ENS"]["max_dd"]
121	        md.append("## Delta vs V121_ENS (backtest winner baseline)\n")
122	        md.append("| System | ΔRet | ΔDD | Verdict |")
123	        md.append("|---|---|---|---|")
124	        for k in ["V11","V12","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]:
125	            if k not in rows: continue
126	            s = rows[k]
127	            dret = (s["ret_total"] - ref_ret) * 100
128	            ddd  = (s["max_dd"] - ref_dd) * 100
129	            verdict = ("Both better" if dret > 0 and ddd > 0
130	                       else "Return better, DD worse" if dret > 0
131	                       else "DD better, return worse" if ddd > 0
132	                       else "Both worse")
133	            md.append(f"| {s['name']} | {dret:+.2f}pp | {ddd:+.2f}pp | {verdict} |")
134	        md.append("")
135	
136	    # V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay watch — expected to beat by +1-4pp OOS in backtest)
137	    if "V121_ENS" in rows and "V121_Kelly" in rows:
138	        ref = rows["V121_ENS"]; ke = rows["V121_Kelly"]
139	        d_ret = (ke["ret_total"] - ref["ret_total"]) * 100
140	        d_dd  = (ke["max_dd"] - ref["max_dd"]) * 100
141	        d_sh  = ke["sharpe"] - ref["sharpe"]
142	        md.append("## V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay) — KEY WATCH\n")
143	        md.append(f"- ΔRet  = **{d_ret:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: +1pp FULL / +4pp OOS)")
144	        md.append(f"- ΔDD   = **{d_dd:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: -4pp wider; gate: ≥ -6pp)")
145	        md.append(f"- ΔShar = **{d_sh:+.2f}**    (backtest expectation: ≈ flat or slight improvement)")
146	        gate = "🟢 GREEN" if (d_ret > -1 and d_dd > -6) else "🟡 YELLOW" if d_dd > -8 else "🔴 RED"
147	        md.append(f"- Gate verdict: **{gate}**")
148	        md.append("")
149	
150	    # NAV curve snapshot every ~10 days
151	    md.append("## Weekly NAV snapshot (every ~5 trading days)\n")
152	    all_dates = sorted(set().union(*[set(nav.index) for nav in nav_all.values()]))
153	    snap_dates = all_dates[::5] + [all_dates[-1]]
154	    snap_dates = sorted(set(snap_dates))
155	    cols = ["Date"] + [rows[k]["name"] for k in keys_order if k in rows]
156	    md.append("| " + " | ".join(cols) + " |")
157	    md.append("|" + "|".join(["---"]*len(cols)) + "|")
158	    for d in snap_dates:
159	        row = [d.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")]
160	        for k in keys_order:
161	            if k not in nav_all: continue
162	            v = nav_all[k].asof(d)
163	            row.append(f"{v/1e9:.2f}B" if pd.notna(v) else "—")
164	        md.append("| " + " | ".join(row) + " |")
165	    md.append("")
166	
167	    md.append("## Files\n")
168	    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
169	        md.append(f"- `{path}` — {name}")
170	    md.append(f"- `data/papertrade_compare5.csv` — daily NAV all systems\n")
171	
172	    out_md = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.md")
173	    with open(out_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
174	        f.write("\n".join(md))
175	    print(f"Wrote {out_md}")
176	
177	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
178	    # CSV with daily NAV all systems
179	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
180	    all_d = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates))
181	    for k, nav in nav_all.items():
182	        all_d[k] = nav.reindex(all_d.index).ffill()
183	    all_d.index.name = "ymd"
184	    out_csv = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.csv")
185	    all_d.to_csv(out_csv)
186	    print(f"Wrote {out_csv}")
187	
188	    # Console summary
189	    print("\n" + "="*80)
190	    print(" PAPER-TRADE COMPARISON")
191	    print("="*80)
192	    for k in keys_order:
193	        if k not in rows: continue
194	        s = rows[k]
195	        print(f" {s['name']:<40} ret {s['ret_total']*100:+6.2f}%  CAGR {s['cagr']*100:+6.2f}%  "
196	              f"DD {s['max_dd']*100:+6.2f}%  Sharpe {s['sharpe']:+.2f}  Calmar {s['calmar']:+.2f}")
197	    print("="*80)
198	
199	
200	if __name__ == "__main__":
201	    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Paper-trade comparison report — 4 systems side-by-side.

Updated 2026-05-27:
  - Removed V3 (pt_v12_live) — alt state test no longer needed
  - Renamed to architecture-based names (V11 / V12 / V121_ENS / V121_Kelly)

Reads:
  data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv     (V11        = Song Sinh: BAL+VN30 + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv     (V12        = Âm Dương: BAL+LAGGED + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv      (V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble M1+M3r AND-HOLD + BASE)
  data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv   (V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0})

Plus VNINDEX from BQ for the same window as a passive benchmark.

Writes:
  data/papertrade_compare5.md    — markdown comparison report
  data/papertrade_compare5.csv   — daily NAV/return for all 4 + VNI
"""
import os, sys, io, datetime as dt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
os.chdir(WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import bq

SYSTEMS = [
    ("V11",         "V11 Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25 ⭐",     "data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12",         "V12 Âm Dương (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b",         "data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_ENS",    "V12.1 Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + BASE",   "data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_Kelly",  "V12.1 Ensemble + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0}",     "data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv"),
]


def vni_series(start: str, end: str) -> pd.Series:
    df = bq(f"SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t "
            f"WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}' "
            f"ORDER BY t.time")
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df.set_index("time")["Close"]


def stats(nav: pd.Series) -> dict:
    nav = nav.dropna()
    if len(nav) < 2: return {}
    ret_total = nav.iloc[-1]/nav.iloc[0] - 1
    days = (nav.index[-1] - nav.index[0]).days
    years = days / 365.25
    cagr = (1+ret_total)**(1/years) - 1 if years > 0 else 0
    daily_ret = nav.pct_change().dropna()
    vol_ann = daily_ret.std() * np.sqrt(252)
    sharpe = (daily_ret.mean()*252)/vol_ann if vol_ann > 0 else 0
    peak = nav.cummax()
    dd = (nav-peak)/peak
    max_dd = dd.min()
    calmar = cagr/abs(max_dd) if max_dd < 0 else float("nan")
    return {"start": nav.index[0].date(), "end": nav.index[-1].date(),
            "days": days, "init": nav.iloc[0], "final": nav.iloc[-1],
            "ret_total": ret_total, "cagr": cagr, "vol_ann": vol_ann,
            "sharpe": sharpe, "max_dd": max_dd, "calmar": calmar}


def main():
    rows = {}
    nav_all = {}
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        full = os.path.join(WORKDIR, path)
        if not os.path.exists(full):
            print(f"  MISSING: {full}"); continue
        df = pd.read_csv(full, parse_dates=["ymd"]).sort_values("ymd")
        nav = df.set_index("ymd")["nav"]
        nav_all[key] = nav
        s = stats(nav); s["name"] = name; rows[key] = s

    if not rows:
        print("No logs found. Run pt_v11_tq34b.py / pt_v12_tq34b.py / pt_v12_live.py first.")
        return

    # VNI benchmark over same window
    first = min(s["start"] for s in rows.values())
    last  = max(s["end"]   for s in rows.values())
    try:
        vni = vni_series(first.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), last.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))
        # rebase to 50B at first day
        vni_nav = (vni / vni.iloc[0]) * 50e9
        nav_all["VNI_BH"] = vni_nav
        rows["VNI_BH"] = {**stats(vni_nav), "name": "VNINDEX Buy & Hold (rebased 50B)"}
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  VNI load failed: {e}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Write markdown
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    now = dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    md = []
    md.append(f"# Paper-Trade Comparison — 5 Systems\n")
    md.append(f"*Generated: {now}*\n")
    md.append(f"*Window: {first} → {last} ({(last-first).days} calendar days)*\n")
    md.append(f"*Init NAV: 50B VND fresh, all-cash, no positions (each system)*\n\n")

    md.append("## Headline metrics\n")
    md.append("| System | Final NAV | Total Ret | CAGR | Vol (ann) | Sharpe | Max DD | Calmar |")
    md.append("|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
    keys_order = ["V11","V12","V121_ENS","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        md.append(f"| **{s['name']}** | {s['final']/1e9:.3f}B | "
                  f"{s['ret_total']*100:+.2f}% | {s['cagr']*100:+.2f}% | "
                  f"{s['vol_ann']*100:.2f}% | {s['sharpe']:+.2f} | "
                  f"{s['max_dd']*100:+.2f}% | {s['calmar']:+.2f} |")
    md.append("")

    # Delta vs V121_ENS (leading backtest winner, baseline for Kelly overlay)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows:
        ref_ret = rows["V121_ENS"]["ret_total"]
        ref_dd  = rows["V121_ENS"]["max_dd"]
        md.append("## Delta vs V121_ENS (backtest winner baseline)\n")
        md.append("| System | ΔRet | ΔDD | Verdict |")
        md.append("|---|---|---|---|")
        for k in ["V11","V12","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]:
            if k not in rows: continue
            s = rows[k]
            dret = (s["ret_total"] - ref_ret) * 100
            ddd  = (s["max_dd"] - ref_dd) * 100
            verdict = ("Both better" if dret > 0 and ddd > 0
                       else "Return better, DD worse" if dret > 0
                       else "DD better, return worse" if ddd > 0
                       else "Both worse")
            md.append(f"| {s['name']} | {dret:+.2f}pp | {ddd:+.2f}pp | {verdict} |")
        md.append("")

    # V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay watch — expected to beat by +1-4pp OOS in backtest)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows and "V121_Kelly" in rows:
        ref = rows["V121_ENS"]; ke = rows["V121_Kelly"]
        d_ret = (ke["ret_total"] - ref["ret_total"]) * 100
        d_dd  = (ke["max_dd"] - ref["max_dd"]) * 100
        d_sh  = ke["sharpe"] - ref["sharpe"]
        md.append("## V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay) — KEY WATCH\n")
        md.append(f"- ΔRet  = **{d_ret:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: +1pp FULL / +4pp OOS)")
        md.append(f"- ΔDD   = **{d_dd:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: -4pp wider; gate: ≥ -6pp)")
        md.append(f"- ΔShar = **{d_sh:+.2f}**    (backtest expectation: ≈ flat or slight improvement)")
        gate = "🟢 GREEN" if (d_ret > -1 and d_dd > -6) else "🟡 YELLOW" if d_dd > -8 else "🔴 RED"
        md.append(f"- Gate verdict: **{gate}**")
        md.append("")

    # NAV curve snapshot every ~10 days
    md.append("## Weekly NAV snapshot (every ~5 trading days)\n")
    all_dates = sorted(set().union(*[set(nav.index) for nav in nav_all.values()]))
    snap_dates = all_dates[::5] + [all_dates[-1]]
    snap_dates = sorted(set(snap_dates))
    cols = ["Date"] + [rows[k]["name"] for k in keys_order if k in rows]
    md.append("| " + " | ".join(cols) + " |")
    md.append("|" + "|".join(["---"]*len(cols)) + "|")
    for d in snap_dates:
        row = [d.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")]
        for k in keys_order:
            if k not in nav_all: continue
            v = nav_all[k].asof(d)
            row.append(f"{v/1e9:.2f}B" if pd.notna(v) else "—")
        md.append("| " + " | ".join(row) + " |")
    md.append("")

    md.append("## Files\n")
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        md.append(f"- `{path}` — {name}")
    md.append(f"- `data/papertrade_compare5.csv` — daily NAV all systems\n")

    out_md = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.md")
    with open(out_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(md))
    print(f"Wrote {out_md}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # CSV with daily NAV all systems
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    all_d = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates))
    for k, nav in nav_all.items():
        all_d[k] = nav.reindex(all_d.index).ffill()
    all_d.index.name = "ymd"
    out_csv = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.csv")
    all_d.to_csv(out_csv)
    print(f"Wrote {out_csv}")

    # Console summary
    print("\n" + "="*80)
    print(" PAPER-TRADE COMPARISON")
    print("="*80)
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        print(f" {s['name']:<40} ret {s['ret_total']*100:+6.2f}%  CAGR {s['cagr']*100:+6.2f}%  "
              f"DD {s['max_dd']*100:+6.2f}%  Sharpe {s['sharpe']:+.2f}  Calmar {s['calmar']:+.2f}")
    print("="*80)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

lastPrompt: okie, bạn thiết lập phần đó đi. đến cuối tháng 6 có thể quyết định chuyển qua hay không?

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Paper-trade comparison report — 4 systems side-by-side.

Updated 2026-05-27:
  - Removed V3 (pt_v12_live) — alt state test no longer needed
  - Renamed to architecture-based names (V11 / V12 / V121_ENS / V121_Kelly)

Reads:
  data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv     (V11        = Song Sinh: BAL+VN30 + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv     (V12        = Âm Dương: BAL+LAGGED + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv      (V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble M1+M3r AND-HOLD + BASE)
  data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv   (V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0})

Plus VNINDEX from BQ for the same window as a passive benchmark.

  data/papertrade_compare5.md    — markdown comparison report
  data/papertrade_compare5.csv   — daily NAV/return for all 4 + VNI

import numpy as np

sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
os.chdir(WORKDIR)

SYSTEMS = [
    ("V11",         "V11 Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25 ⭐",     "data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12",         "V12 Âm Dương (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b",         "data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_ENS",    "V12.1 Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + BASE",   "data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_Kelly",  "V12.1 Ensemble + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0}",     "data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv"),
]


def vni_series(start: str, end: str) -> pd.Series:
    df = bq(f"SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t "
            f"WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}' "
            f"ORDER BY t.time")
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df.set_index("time")["Close"]

    nav = nav.dropna()
    if len(nav) < 2: return {}

    cagr = (1+ret_total)**(1/years) - 1 if years > 0 else 0

    dd = (nav-peak)/peak
    max_dd = dd.min()
    calmar = cagr/abs(max_dd) if max_dd < 0 else float("nan")
    return {"start": nav.index[0].date(), "end": nav.index[-1].date(),
            "days": days, "init": nav.iloc[0], "final": nav.iloc[-1],
            "ret_total": ret_total, "cagr": cagr, "vol_ann": vol_ann,
            "sharpe": sharpe, "max_dd": max_dd, "calmar": calmar}


def main():
    rows = {}
    nav_all = {}
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        full = os.path.join(WORKDIR, path)
        if not os.path.exists(full):
            print(f"  MISSING: {full}"); continue
        df = pd.read_csv(full, parse_dates=["ymd"]).sort_values("ymd")
        nav = df.set_index("ymd")["nav"]
        nav_all[key] = nav
        s = stats(nav); s["name"] = name; rows[key] = s

    if not rows:
        print("No logs found. Run pt_v11_tq34b.py / pt_v12_tq34b.py / pt_v12_live.py first.")
        return

    # VNI benchmark over same window
    first = min(s["start"] for s in rows.values())
    last  = max(s["end"]   for s in rows.values())
    try:
        vni = vni_series(first.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), last.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))
        # rebase to 50B at first day
        vni_nav = (vni / vni.iloc[0]) * 50e9
        nav_all["VNI_BH"] = vni_nav
        rows["VNI_BH"] = {**stats(vni_nav), "name": "VNINDEX Buy & Hold (rebased 50B)"}
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  VNI load failed: {e}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Write markdown
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    now = dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    md = []
    md.append(f"# Paper-Trade Comparison — 5 Systems\n")
    md.append(f"*Generated: {now}*\n")
    md.append(f"*Window: {first} → {last} ({(last-first).days} calendar days)*\n")
    md.append(f"*Init NAV: 50B VND fresh, all-cash, no positions (each system)*\n\n")

    md.append("| System | Final NAV | Total Ret | CAGR | Vol (ann) | Sharpe | Max DD | Calmar |")
    md.append("|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
    keys_order = ["V11","V12","V121_ENS","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        md.append(f"| **{s['name']}** | {s['final']/1e9:.3f}B | "

                  f"{s['vol_ann']*100:.2f}% | {s['sharpe']:+.2f} | "

    if "V121_ENS" in rows:
        ref_ret = rows["V121_ENS"]["ret_total"]
        ref_dd  = rows["V121_ENS"]["max_dd"]
        md.append("## Delta vs V121_ENS (backtest winner baseline)\n")
        md.append("| System | ΔRet | ΔDD | Verdict |")
        md.append("|---|---|---|---|")
        for k in ["V11","V12","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]:
            if k not in rows: continue
            s = rows[k]
            dret = (s["ret_total"] - ref_ret) * 100
            ddd  = (s["max_dd"] - ref_dd) * 100
            verdict = ("Both better" if dret > 0 and ddd > 0
                       else "Return better, DD worse" if dret > 0
                       else "DD better, return worse" if ddd > 0
                       else "Both worse")
            md.append(f"| {s['name']} | {dret:+.2f}pp | {ddd:+.2f}pp | {verdict} |")
        md.append("")

    # V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay watch — expected to beat by +1-4pp OOS in backtest)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows and "V121_Kelly" in rows:
        ref = rows["V121_ENS"]; ke = rows["V121_Kelly"]
        d_ret = (ke["ret_total"] - ref["ret_total"]) * 100
        d_dd  = (ke["max_dd"] - ref["max_dd"]) * 100
        d_sh  = ke["sharpe"] - ref["sharpe"]
        md.append("## V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay) — KEY WATCH\n")
        md.append(f"- ΔRet  = **{d_ret:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: +1pp FULL / +4pp OOS)")
        md.append(f"- ΔDD   = **{d_dd:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: -4pp wider; gate: ≥ -6pp)")
        md.append(f"- ΔShar = **{d_sh:+.2f}**    (backtest expectation: ≈ flat or slight improvement)")
        gate = "🟢 GREEN" if (d_ret > -1 and d_dd > -6) else "🟡 YELLOW" if d_dd > -8 else "🔴 RED"
        md.append(f"- Gate verdict: **{gate}**")
        md.append("")

    # NAV curve snapshot every ~10 days
    md.append("## Weekly NAV snapshot (every ~5 trading days)\n")
    all_dates = sorted(set().union(*[set(nav.index) for nav in nav_all.values()]))
    snap_dates = all_dates[::5] + [all_dates[-1]]
    snap_dates = sorted(set(snap_dates))
    cols = ["Date"] + [rows[k]["name"] for k in keys_order if k in rows]
    md.append("| " + " | ".join(cols) + " |")
    md.append("|" + "|".join(["---"]*len(cols)) + "|")
    for d in snap_dates:
        row = [d.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")]
        for k in keys_order:
            if k not in nav_all: continue
            v = nav_all[k].asof(d)
            row.append(f"{v/1e9:.2f}B" if pd.notna(v) else "—")
        md.append("| " + " | ".join(row) + " |")
    md.append("")

    md.append("## Files\n")
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        md.append(f"- `{path}` — {name}")
    md.append(f"- `data/papertrade_compare5.csv` — daily NAV all systems\n")

    out_md = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.md")
    with open(out_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(md))
    print(f"Wrote {out_md}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # CSV with daily NAV all systems
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    all_d = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates))
    for k, nav in nav_all.items():
        all_d[k] = nav.reindex(all_d.index).ffill()
    all_d.index.name = "ymd"
    out_csv = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.csv")
    all_d.to_csv(out_csv)
    print(f"Wrote {out_csv}")

    # Console summary
    print("\n" + "="*80)
    print(" PAPER-TRADE COMPARISON")
    print("="*80)
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        print(f" {s['name']:<40} ret {s['ret_total']*100:+6.2f}%  CAGR {s['cagr']*100:+6.2f}%  "
              f"DD {s['max_dd']*100:+6.2f}%  Sharpe {s['sharpe']:+.2f}  Calmar {s['calmar']:+.2f}")
    print("="*80)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Paper-trade comparison report — 4 systems side-by-side.

Updated 2026-05-27:
  - Removed V3 (pt_v12_live) — alt state test no longer needed
  - Renamed to architecture-based names (V11 / V12 / V121_ENS / V121_Kelly)

Reads:
  data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv     (V11        = Song Sinh: BAL+VN30 + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv     (V12        = Âm Dương: BAL+LAGGED + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv      (V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble M1+M3r AND-HOLD + BASE)
  data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv   (V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0})

Plus VNINDEX from BQ for the same window as a passive benchmark.

Writes:
  data/papertrade_compare5.md    — markdown comparison report
  data/papertrade_compare5.csv   — daily NAV/return for all 4 + VNI
"""
import os, sys, io, datetime as dt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
os.chdir(WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import bq

SYSTEMS = [
    ("V11",         "V11 Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25 ⭐",     "data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12",         "V12 Âm Dương (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b",         "data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12_DT4",     "V12 Âm Dương + DT 4-gate (SHADOW A/B) ⭐",  "data/pt_v12_dt4_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_ENS",    "V12.1 Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + BASE",   "data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_Kelly",  "V12.1 Ensemble + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0}",     "data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv"),
]


def vni_series(start: str, end: str) -> pd.Series:
    df = bq(f"SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t "
            f"WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}' "
            f"ORDER BY t.time")
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df.set_index("time")["Close"]


def stats(nav: pd.Series) -> dict:
    nav = nav.dropna()
    if len(nav) < 2: return {}
    ret_total = nav.iloc[-1]/nav.iloc[0] - 1
    days = (nav.index[-1] - nav.index[0]).days
    years = days / 365.25
    cagr = (1+ret_total)**(1/years) - 1 if years > 0 else 0
    daily_ret = nav.pct_change().dropna()
    vol_ann = daily_ret.std() * np.sqrt(252)
    sharpe = (daily_ret.mean()*252)/vol_ann if vol_ann > 0 else 0
    peak = nav.cummax()
    dd = (nav-peak)/peak
    max_dd = dd.min()
    calmar = cagr/abs(max_dd) if max_dd < 0 else float("nan")
    return {"start": nav.index[0].date(), "end": nav.index[-1].date(),
            "days": days, "init": nav.iloc[0], "final": nav.iloc[-1],
            "ret_total": ret_total, "cagr": cagr, "vol_ann": vol_ann,
            "sharpe": sharpe, "max_dd": max_dd, "calmar": calmar}


def main():
    rows = {}
    nav_all = {}
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        full = os.path.join(WORKDIR, path)
        if not os.path.exists(full):
            print(f"  MISSING: {full}"); continue
        df = pd.read_csv(full, parse_dates=["ymd"]).sort_values("ymd")
        nav = df.set_index("ymd")["nav"]
        nav_all[key] = nav
        s = stats(nav); s["name"] = name; rows[key] = s

    if not rows:
        print("No logs found. Run pt_v11_tq34b.py / pt_v12_tq34b.py / pt_v12_live.py first.")
        return

    # VNI benchmark over same window
    first = min(s["start"] for s in rows.values())
    last  = max(s["end"]   for s in rows.values())
    try:
        vni = vni_series(first.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), last.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))
        # rebase to 50B at first day
        vni_nav = (vni / vni.iloc[0]) * 50e9
        nav_all["VNI_BH"] = vni_nav
        rows["VNI_BH"] = {**stats(vni_nav), "name": "VNINDEX Buy & Hold (rebased 50B)"}
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  VNI load failed: {e}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Write markdown
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    now = dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    md = []
    md.append(f"# Paper-Trade Comparison — 5 Systems\n")
    md.append(f"*Generated: {now}*\n")
    md.append(f"*Window: {first} → {last} ({(last-first).days} calendar days)*\n")
    md.append(f"*Init NAV: 50B VND fresh, all-cash, no positions (each system)*\n\n")

    md.append("## Headline metrics\n")
    md.append("| System | Final NAV | Total Ret | CAGR | Vol (ann) | Sharpe | Max DD | Calmar |")
    md.append("|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
    keys_order = ["V11","V12","V121_ENS","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        md.append(f"| **{s['name']}** | {s['final']/1e9:.3f}B | "
                  f"{s['ret_total']*100:+.2f}% | {s['cagr']*100:+.2f}% | "
                  f"{s['vol_ann']*100:.2f}% | {s['sharpe']:+.2f} | "
                  f"{s['max_dd']*100:+.2f}% | {s['calmar']:+.2f} |")
    md.append("")

    # Delta vs V121_ENS (leading backtest winner, baseline for Kelly overlay)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows:
        ref_ret = rows["V121_ENS"]["ret_total"]
        ref_dd  = rows["V121_ENS"]["max_dd"]
        md.append("## Delta vs V121_ENS (backtest winner baseline)\n")
        md.append("| System | ΔRet | ΔDD | Verdict |")
        md.append("|---|---|---|---|")
        for k in ["V11","V12","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]:
            if k not in rows: continue
            s = rows[k]
            dret = (s["ret_total"] - ref_ret) * 100
            ddd  = (s["max_dd"] - ref_dd) * 100
            verdict = ("Both better" if dret > 0 and ddd > 0
                       else "Return better, DD worse" if dret > 0
                       else "DD better, return worse" if ddd > 0
                       else "Both worse")
            md.append(f"| {s['name']} | {dret:+.2f}pp | {ddd:+.2f}pp | {verdict} |")
        md.append("")

    # V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay watch — expected to beat by +1-4pp OOS in backtest)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows and "V121_Kelly" in rows:
        ref = rows["V121_ENS"]; ke = rows["V121_Kelly"]
        d_ret = (ke["ret_total"] - ref["ret_total"]) * 100
        d_dd  = (ke["max_dd"] - ref["max_dd"]) * 100
        d_sh  = ke["sharpe"] - ref["sharpe"]
        md.append("## V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay) — KEY WATCH\n")
        md.append(f"- ΔRet  = **{d_ret:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: +1pp FULL / +4pp OOS)")
        md.append(f"- ΔDD   = **{d_dd:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: -4pp wider; gate: ≥ -6pp)")
        md.append(f"- ΔShar = **{d_sh:+.2f}**    (backtest expectation: ≈ flat or slight improvement)")
        gate = "🟢 GREEN" if (d_ret > -1 and d_dd > -6) else "🟡 YELLOW" if d_dd > -8 else "🔴 RED"
        md.append(f"- Gate verdict: **{gate}**")
        md.append("")

    # NAV curve snapshot every ~10 days
    md.append("## Weekly NAV snapshot (every ~5 trading days)\n")
    all_dates = sorted(set().union(*[set(nav.index) for nav in nav_all.values()]))
    snap_dates = all_dates[::5] + [all_dates[-1]]
    snap_dates = sorted(set(snap_dates))
    cols = ["Date"] + [rows[k]["name"] for k in keys_order if k in rows]
    md.append("| " + " | ".join(cols) + " |")
    md.append("|" + "|".join(["---"]*len(cols)) + "|")
    for d in snap_dates:
        row = [d.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")]
        for k in keys_order:
            if k not in nav_all: continue
            v = nav_all[k].asof(d)
            row.append(f"{v/1e9:.2f}B" if pd.notna(v) else "—")
        md.append("| " + " | ".join(row) + " |")
    md.append("")

    md.append("## Files\n")
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        md.append(f"- `{path}` — {name}")
    md.append(f"- `data/papertrade_compare5.csv` — daily NAV all systems\n")

    out_md = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.md")
    with open(out_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(md))
    print(f"Wrote {out_md}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # CSV with daily NAV all systems
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    all_d = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates))
    for k, nav in nav_all.items():
        all_d[k] = nav.reindex(all_d.index).ffill()
    all_d.index.name = "ymd"
    out_csv = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.csv")
    all_d.to_csv(out_csv)
    print(f"Wrote {out_csv}")

    # Console summary
    print("\n" + "="*80)
    print(" PAPER-TRADE COMPARISON")
    print("="*80)
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        print(f" {s['name']:<40} ret {s['ret_total']*100:+6.2f}%  CAGR {s['cagr']*100:+6.2f}%  "
              f"DD {s['max_dd']*100:+6.2f}%  Sharpe {s['sharpe']:+.2f}  Calmar {s['calmar']:+.2f}")
    print("="*80)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Paper-trade comparison report — 4 systems side-by-side.

Updated 2026-05-27:
  - Removed V3 (pt_v12_live) — alt state test no longer needed
  - Renamed to architecture-based names (V11 / V12 / V121_ENS / V121_Kelly)

Reads:
  data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv     (V11        = Song Sinh: BAL+VN30 + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv     (V12        = Âm Dương: BAL+LAGGED + TQ34b)
  data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv      (V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble M1+M3r AND-HOLD + BASE)
  data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv   (V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0})

Plus VNINDEX from BQ for the same window as a passive benchmark.

Writes:
  data/papertrade_compare5.md    — markdown comparison report
  data/papertrade_compare5.csv   — daily NAV/return for all 4 + VNI
"""
import os, sys, io, datetime as dt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
os.chdir(WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import bq

SYSTEMS = [
    ("V11",         "V11 Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25 ⭐",     "data/pt_v11_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12",         "V12 Âm Dương (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b",         "data/pt_v12_tq34b_logs.csv"),
    ("V12_DT4",     "V12 Âm Dương + DT 4-gate (SHADOW A/B) ⭐",  "data/pt_v12_dt4_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_ENS",    "V12.1 Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + BASE",   "data/pt_v121_ens_logs.csv"),
    ("V121_Kelly",  "V12.1 Ensemble + Kelly NEUTRAL{3:1.0}",     "data/pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv"),
]


def vni_series(start: str, end: str) -> pd.Series:
    df = bq(f"SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t "
            f"WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}' "
            f"ORDER BY t.time")
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df.set_index("time")["Close"]


def stats(nav: pd.Series) -> dict:
    nav = nav.dropna()
    if len(nav) < 2: return {}
    ret_total = nav.iloc[-1]/nav.iloc[0] - 1
    days = (nav.index[-1] - nav.index[0]).days
    years = days / 365.25
    cagr = (1+ret_total)**(1/years) - 1 if years > 0 else 0
    daily_ret = nav.pct_change().dropna()
    vol_ann = daily_ret.std() * np.sqrt(252)
    sharpe = (daily_ret.mean()*252)/vol_ann if vol_ann > 0 else 0
    peak = nav.cummax()
    dd = (nav-peak)/peak
    max_dd = dd.min()
    calmar = cagr/abs(max_dd) if max_dd < 0 else float("nan")
    return {"start": nav.index[0].date(), "end": nav.index[-1].date(),
            "days": days, "init": nav.iloc[0], "final": nav.iloc[-1],
            "ret_total": ret_total, "cagr": cagr, "vol_ann": vol_ann,
            "sharpe": sharpe, "max_dd": max_dd, "calmar": calmar}


def main():
    rows = {}
    nav_all = {}
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        full = os.path.join(WORKDIR, path)
        if not os.path.exists(full):
            print(f"  MISSING: {full}"); continue
        df = pd.read_csv(full, parse_dates=["ymd"]).sort_values("ymd")
        nav = df.set_index("ymd")["nav"]
        nav_all[key] = nav
        s = stats(nav); s["name"] = name; rows[key] = s

    if not rows:
        print("No logs found. Run pt_v11_tq34b.py / pt_v12_tq34b.py / pt_v12_live.py first.")
        return

    # VNI benchmark over same window
    first = min(s["start"] for s in rows.values())
    last  = max(s["end"]   for s in rows.values())
    try:
        vni = vni_series(first.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), last.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))
        # rebase to 50B at first day
        vni_nav = (vni / vni.iloc[0]) * 50e9
        nav_all["VNI_BH"] = vni_nav
        rows["VNI_BH"] = {**stats(vni_nav), "name": "VNINDEX Buy & Hold (rebased 50B)"}
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  VNI load failed: {e}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Write markdown
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    now = dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    md = []
    md.append(f"# Paper-Trade Comparison — 5 Systems\n")
    md.append(f"*Generated: {now}*\n")
    md.append(f"*Window: {first} → {last} ({(last-first).days} calendar days)*\n")
    md.append(f"*Init NAV: 50B VND fresh, all-cash, no positions (each system)*\n\n")

    md.append("## Headline metrics\n")
    md.append("| System | Final NAV | Total Ret | CAGR | Vol (ann) | Sharpe | Max DD | Calmar |")
    md.append("|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
    keys_order = ["V11","V12","V12_DT4","V121_ENS","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        md.append(f"| **{s['name']}** | {s['final']/1e9:.3f}B | "
                  f"{s['ret_total']*100:+.2f}% | {s['cagr']*100:+.2f}% | "
                  f"{s['vol_ann']*100:.2f}% | {s['sharpe']:+.2f} | "
                  f"{s['max_dd']*100:+.2f}% | {s['calmar']:+.2f} |")
    md.append("")

    # Delta vs V121_ENS (leading backtest winner, baseline for Kelly overlay)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows:
        ref_ret = rows["V121_ENS"]["ret_total"]
        ref_dd  = rows["V121_ENS"]["max_dd"]
        md.append("## Delta vs V121_ENS (backtest winner baseline)\n")
        md.append("| System | ΔRet | ΔDD | Verdict |")
        md.append("|---|---|---|---|")
        for k in ["V11","V12","V121_Kelly","VNI_BH"]:
            if k not in rows: continue
            s = rows[k]
            dret = (s["ret_total"] - ref_ret) * 100
            ddd  = (s["max_dd"] - ref_dd) * 100
            verdict = ("Both better" if dret > 0 and ddd > 0
                       else "Return better, DD worse" if dret > 0
                       else "DD better, return worse" if ddd > 0
                       else "Both worse")
            md.append(f"| {s['name']} | {dret:+.2f}pp | {ddd:+.2f}pp | {verdict} |")
        md.append("")

    # V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay watch — expected to beat by +1-4pp OOS in backtest)
    if "V121_ENS" in rows and "V121_Kelly" in rows:
        ref = rows["V121_ENS"]; ke = rows["V121_Kelly"]
        d_ret = (ke["ret_total"] - ref["ret_total"]) * 100
        d_dd  = (ke["max_dd"] - ref["max_dd"]) * 100
        d_sh  = ke["sharpe"] - ref["sharpe"]
        md.append("## V121_Kelly vs V121_ENS (Kelly overlay) — KEY WATCH\n")
        md.append(f"- ΔRet  = **{d_ret:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: +1pp FULL / +4pp OOS)")
        md.append(f"- ΔDD   = **{d_dd:+.2f}pp**  (backtest expectation: -4pp wider; gate: ≥ -6pp)")
        md.append(f"- ΔShar = **{d_sh:+.2f}**    (backtest expectation: ≈ flat or slight improvement)")
        gate = "🟢 GREEN" if (d_ret > -1 and d_dd > -6) else "🟡 YELLOW" if d_dd > -8 else "🔴 RED"
        md.append(f"- Gate verdict: **{gate}**")
        md.append("")

    # NAV curve snapshot every ~10 days
    md.append("## Weekly NAV snapshot (every ~5 trading days)\n")
    all_dates = sorted(set().union(*[set(nav.index) for nav in nav_all.values()]))
    snap_dates = all_dates[::5] + [all_dates[-1]]
    snap_dates = sorted(set(snap_dates))
    cols = ["Date"] + [rows[k]["name"] for k in keys_order if k in rows]
    md.append("| " + " | ".join(cols) + " |")
    md.append("|" + "|".join(["---"]*len(cols)) + "|")
    for d in snap_dates:
        row = [d.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")]
        for k in keys_order:
            if k not in nav_all: continue
            v = nav_all[k].asof(d)
            row.append(f"{v/1e9:.2f}B" if pd.notna(v) else "—")
        md.append("| " + " | ".join(row) + " |")
    md.append("")

    md.append("## Files\n")
    for key, name, path in SYSTEMS:
        md.append(f"- `{path}` — {name}")
    md.append(f"- `data/papertrade_compare5.csv` — daily NAV all systems\n")

    out_md = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.md")
    with open(out_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(md))
    print(f"Wrote {out_md}")

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # CSV with daily NAV all systems
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    all_d = pd.DataFrame(index=pd.DatetimeIndex(all_dates))
    for k, nav in nav_all.items():
        all_d[k] = nav.reindex(all_d.index).ffill()
    all_d.index.name = "ymd"
    out_csv = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "papertrade_compare5.csv")
    all_d.to_csv(out_csv)
    print(f"Wrote {out_csv}")

    # Console summary
    print("\n" + "="*80)
    print(" PAPER-TRADE COMPARISON")
    print("="*80)
    for k in keys_order:
        if k not in rows: continue
        s = rows[k]
        print(f" {s['name']:<40} ret {s['ret_total']*100:+6.2f}%  CAGR {s['cagr']*100:+6.2f}%  "
              f"DD {s['max_dd']*100:+6.2f}%  Sharpe {s['sharpe']:+.2f}  Calmar {s['calmar']:+.2f}")
    print("="*80)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.originalFile:
@echo off
REM Daily paper-trade orchestrator — runs 4 sims + comparison.
REM Triggered by Windows Task Scheduler at 15:30 daily.
REM Logs each run to data\papertrade_run_YYYY-MM-DD.log
REM
REM Updated 2026-05-27:
REM  - Removed pt_v12_live (V3 alt state test, no longer needed)
REM  - UPGRADED V11: KELLY ETF + DT_10_25_25 state (validated +1.90pp Full CAGR)
REM  - Renamed versions to architecture-based names for clarity:
REM    V11        = Song Sinh (BAL+VN30) + KELLY + DT_10_25_25  ⭐ upgraded
REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE
REM    V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL parking {3:1.0}

setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\papertrade_run_%TODAY%.log

cd /d "%WORKDIR%"

echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
echo Paper-trade daily run (4 systems) — %DATE% %TIME%    >> "%LOGFILE%"
echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"

echo [1/5] pt_v11_tq34b.py        (V11 = Song Sinh + KELLY + DT_10_25_25) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v11_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [2/5] pt_v12_tq34b.py        (V12 = Am Duong: BAL+LAGGED)        >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v12_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [3/5] pt_v121_ensemble.py    (V121_ENS: V12.1 + Ensemble + BASE) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ensemble.py                                             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [4/5] pt_v121_ens_q2.py      (V121_Kelly: V121_ENS + Kelly)      >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ens_q2.py                                               >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5/5] papertrade_compare.py  (4-system comparison)               >> "%LOGFILE%"
python papertrade_compare.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo Done %TIME%                                                       >> "%LOGFILE%"
endlocal

## Paper-trade shadow A/B set up (2026-05-28)

Goal: live-validate DT 4-gate on non-ensemble paper systems, decide end June 2026. Discovery: `pt_v11_tq34b.py` was ALREADY upgraded to DT_10_25_25+KELLY (2026-05-27) — so V11 paper-trade is already on DT. The only non-ensemble system still on raw TQ34b was **V12** (`pt_v12_tq34b.py`, BAL+LAGGED, BASE ETF). So the live A/B = V12+DT4 vs V12+TQ34b.

- **Created `pt_v12_dt4.py`** (clone of pt_v12_tq34b.py). State = DT 4-gate computed ON-THE-FLY via `_dt_4gate` (default=10/enC=25/exC=10/enX=25/exX=10) from the live `vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean` table (2014+ warmup → slice to window). On-the-fly avoids stale-BQ-table problem; ≡ DT_10_25_25. Outputs `data/pt_v12_dt4_*`. Verified runs + reconciles ($0.00 diff).
- **Wired into `papertrade_daily.bat`** as step [3/6] (scheduled task picks it up automatically — no scheduler change).
- **`papertrade_compare.py`**: added V12_DT4 arm + dedicated "V12_DT4 vs V12_TQ34b — DT 4-gate A/B (DECISION: end June 2026)" section with gate (🟢 SWITCH if ΔRet>-0.5pp & ΔDD>-1pp / 🟡 HOLD / 🔴 KEEP TQ). Output `data/papertrade_compare5.md`.
- **Initial reading (Apr1→May19, ~32 sessions)**: V12_DT4 +3.36% vs V12_TQ34b +2.03% = **+1.34pp** (matches backtest +1.06pp), DD -0.95 vs -0.87 (≈), Sharpe 3.03 vs 3.44. Verdict 🟢 but short-window caveat.
- Decision date: end June 2026 (~3mo live data). Read `data/papertrade_compare5.md`. NOTE END_DATE limited by lagged_pos_ov.pkl freshness (was May 19); ensure LAGGED data refreshed for full window.

lines: **Conclusion: YES, DT 4-gate combines effectively with all 3 non-ensemble paper-trade systems (V11/V12/V12.1) — POSITIVE in every period (Full/IS/OOS), +1.0 to +1.3pp Full CAGR.** V11 wins most (+1.30pp + real DD improvement -16.7 vs -18.5, simplest arch → DT's fewer transitions help most). V12/V12.1 gain return but DD already low (LAGGED state-independent) so DT only adds return. Benefit DECREASES with architecture complexity (V11 1.30 > V12 1.06 > V12.1 0.99). DT slightly lowers Sharpe on V12/V12.1 (1.61 vs 1.63, concentrated exposure) but CAGR dominates; V11 is clean all-round win. **Ensemble = correctly excluded: DT HURTS recent OOS (24-26: -0.59 to -0.61pp), ensemble pre-empts state timing → DT redundant + slow CRISIS confirm hurts in 2024-26.** Best static+DT: V12.1+DT (22.81%/Sh1.62/DD-14.7%). V12+LIVE paper-trade (LIVE=v3.4b) → swap to DT gains ~+1pp like V12+TQ34b. NAV: `data/v12_ensemble_dt_nav.csv`.

On-the-fly avoids stale-BQ-table problem; ≡ DT_10_25_25. Outputs `data/pt_v12_dt4_*`. Verified runs + reconciles ($0.00 diff).
+- **Wired into `papertrade_daily.bat`** as step [3/6] (scheduled task picks it up automatically — no scheduler change).

+- **`papertrade_compare.py`**: added V12_DT4 arm + dedicated "V12_DT4 vs V12_TQ34b — DT 4-gate A/B (DECISION: end June 2026)" section with gate (🟢 SWITCH if ΔRet>-0.5pp & ΔDD>-1pp / 🟡 HOLD / 🔴 KEEP TQ). Output `data/papertrade_compare5.md`.

+- **Initial reading (Apr1→May19, ~32 sessions)**: V12_DT4 +3.36% vs V12_TQ34b +2.03% = **+1.34pp** (matches backtest +1.06pp), DD -0.95 vs -0.87 (≈), Sharpe 3.03 vs 3.44. Verdict 🟢 but short-window caveat.
+- Decision date: end June 2026 (~3mo live data). Read `data/papertrade_compare5.md`. NOTE END_DATE limited by lagged_pos_ov.pkl freshness (was May 19); ensure LAGGED data refreshed for full window.

content.text:
Xong. Đã thiết lập shadow A/B cho DT 4-gate trên các hệ paper-trade ngoài ensemble.

## Đã làm

**Phát hiện quan trọng:** `pt_v11_tq34b.py` (dù tên là "tq34b") **đã được nâng cấp sang DT + KELLY từ 2026-05-27** — nên V11 paper-trade *đã* chạy DT rồi. Hệ non-ensemble duy nhất còn dùng TQ34b thô là **V12**. Vậy A/B sống cần thiết lập là V12+DT4 vs V12+TQ34b.

1. **`pt_v12_dt4.py`** (clone của pt_v12_tq34b.py) — state = DT 4-gate tính on-the-fly từ bảng TQ34b live (warmup 2014+, không phụ thuộc bảng BQ tĩnh nên luôn đồng bộ). Chạy + reconcile sạch ($0.00 lệch). Output `data/pt_v12_dt4_*`.
2. **`papertrade_daily.bat`** — thêm bước [3/6]; scheduled task tự nhận, không cần đổi lịch.
3. **`papertrade_compare.py`** — thêm cột V12_DT4 + mục riêng *"V12_DT4 vs V12_TQ34b — A/B (DECISION: end June 2026)"* với cổng tự động: 🟢 SWITCH nếu ΔRet > -0.5pp và ΔDD > -1pp / 🟡 HOLD / 🔴 KEEP TQ.

## Trả lời câu hỏi "cuối tháng 6 quyết định được không?"

**Được.** Đến cuối tháng 6 sẽ có ~3 tháng dữ liệu A/B sống (Apr 1 → Jun 30). Báo cáo `data/papertrade_compare5.md` cập nhật hằng ngày 15:30 và tự gắn verdict. Bạn chỉ cần đọc mục A/B đó cuối tháng 6.

**Số liệu ban đầu (Apr 1 → May 19, ~32 phiên):** V12+DT4 +3.36% vs V12+TQ34b +2.03% = **+1.34pp** (khớp backtest +1.06pp), DD ≈ nhau, Sharpe DT thấp hơn chút. Hướng tích cực nhưng cửa sổ còn ngắn.

## Một lưu ý cần xử lý

END_DATE đang bị giới hạn ở **2026-05-19** do `lagged_pos_ov.pkl` (dữ liệu LAGGED) chưa fresh tới hôm nay — ảnh hưởng cả hai arm như nhau nên A/B vẫn công bằng, nhưng để có đủ dữ liệu tới cuối tháng 6 cho quyết định, cần đảm bảo pipeline refresh LAGGED chạy đều. Bạn có muốn tôi kiểm tra/khắc phục phần refresh LAGGED không? Và bạn có muốn tôi đặt một nhắc lịch tự động vào cuối tháng 6 để review A/B này không?

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
    try:
        cmd = f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=10000000'
        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=1800, shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    if r.returncode != 0: raise RuntimeError(r.stderr[:500])
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

# ─── 1. Pull release events ──────────────────────────────────────────────
ev_cache = "earnings_events.pkl"
if os.path.exists(ev_cache):
    with open(ev_cache,"rb") as f: ev = pickle.load(f)
    print(f"[1] Loaded events cache: {len(ev):,} events")
else:
    print("[1] Pulling release events from BQ ...")
    ev = bq_query("""
    SELECT f.ticker, f.quarter, f.Release_Date, f.NP_R, f.Revenue_YoY_P0, f.NP_P0, f.NP_P4
    FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
    WHERE f.Release_Date IS NOT NULL
      AND f.Release_Date >= '2009-01-01'
      AND f.NP_R IS NOT NULL
    """)
    ev["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(ev["Release_Date"])
    with open(ev_cache,"wb") as f: pickle.dump(ev, f)
    print(f"  Pulled {len(ev):,} events from {ev['ticker'].nunique()} tickers")

# ─── 2. Pull daily prices (Close only) for tickers in events ─────────────
px_cache = "earnings_px.pkl"
if os.path.exists(px_cache):
    with open(px_cache,"rb") as f: px = pickle.load(f)
    print(f"[2] Loaded price cache: {len(px):,} rows")
else:
    print("[2] Pulling daily Close for all event tickers (2009-2026) ...")
    tks = ev["ticker"].unique()
    print(f"  {len(tks)} tickers")
    px = bq_query("""
    SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close
    FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
    WHERE t.time >= '2008-12-01' AND t.Close > 0
    """)
    px["time"] = pd.to_datetime(px["time"])
    px = px[px["ticker"].isin(tks)]
    with open(px_cache,"wb") as f: pickle.dump(px, f)
    print(f"  Pulled + cached: {len(px):,} rows")

px_piv = px.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Close", aggfunc="first").sort_index()
# Use business-day forward fill for missing days (preserve event-day lookup)
px_piv = px_piv.ffill(limit=5)
print(f"  Pivot: {len(px_piv)} days × {len(px_piv.columns)} tickers")

# ─── 3. Compute pre/release/post returns per event ───────────────────────

else:
    tk_list = "','".join(universe)

px_open = ov.pivot_table(index="time", columns="ticker", values="Open", aggfunc="first").sort_index()

# ─── 1. Pull NP_P0..NP_P7 for all events ─────────────────────────────────
nq_cache = "earnings_surprise_data.pkl"
if os.path.exists(nq_cache):
    with open(nq_cache, "rb") as f: fin = pickle.load(f)
    print(f"[1] Loaded cache: {len(fin):,} events")
else:
    print("[1] Pulling NP_P0..NP_P7 from BQ ...")
    fin = bq_query("""
    SELECT f.ticker, f.quarter, f.time, f.Release_Date,
           f.NP_P0, f.NP_P1, f.NP_P2, f.NP_P3, f.NP_P4,
           f.NP_P5, f.NP_P6, f.NP_P7,
           f.NP_R, f.Revenue_YoY_P0
    FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
    WHERE f.Release_Date IS NOT NULL
      AND f.Release_Date >= '2009-01-01'
      AND f.NP_P0 IS NOT NULL
    """)
    fin["Release_Date"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["Release_Date"])
    fin["time"] = pd.to_datetime(fin["time"])
    with open(nq_cache, "wb") as f: pickle.dump(fin, f)
    print(f"  Pulled + cached: {len(fin):,} events / {fin['ticker'].nunique()} tickers")

# ─── 2. Compute 5 expectation models + surprise scores ───────────────────

content.text: I have all 4 builder queries. The root issue is clear: all 4 LAGGED caches use "load-if-exists, never refresh" logic. The binding constraint for END_DATE is the daily-price caches (`earnings_px.pkl`, `lagged_pos_ov.pkl`). Let me read the events-classification logic so I can rebuild it correctly, then write one robust incremental refresh script.

content.content:
95	# ─── 3. Compute pre/release/post returns per event ───────────────────────
96	print("\n[3] Computing event windows ...")
97	all_dates = px_piv.index
98	all_dates_arr = np.array(all_dates)
99	
100	def get_close(tk, dt):
101	    if tk not in px_piv.columns: return np.nan
102	    # find nearest trading day on or before dt
103	    pos = np.searchsorted(all_dates_arr, np.datetime64(dt), side="right") - 1
104	    if pos < 0: return np.nan
105	    return px_piv.iloc[pos][tk]
106	
107	def get_close_offset(tk, ref_dt, offset_days):
108	    """Nearest trading day at ref_dt + offset business days. offset_days can be negative."""
109	    if tk not in px_piv.columns: return np.nan, None
110	    ref = np.datetime64(ref_dt)
111	    pos_ref = np.searchsorted(all_dates_arr, ref, side="right") - 1
112	    if pos_ref < 0: return np.nan, None
113	    target_pos = pos_ref + offset_days
114	    if target_pos < 0 or target_pos >= len(all_dates_arr): return np.nan, None
115	    return px_piv.iloc[target_pos][tk], all_dates_arr[target_pos]
116	
117	results = []
118	n_total = len(ev)
119	for i, row in ev.iterrows():
120	    if i % 5000 == 0: print(f"  Event {i}/{n_total} ...", flush=True)
121	    tk = row["ticker"]; rdt = row["Release_Date"]
122	    if tk not in px_piv.columns: continue
123	    p_pre30, _    = get_close_offset(tk, rdt, -30)
124	    p_m1, _       = get_close_offset(tk, rdt, -1)
125	    p_p5, _       = get_close_offset(tk, rdt, +5)
126	    p_p30, _      = get_close_offset(tk, rdt, +30)
127	    if any(pd.isna(p) for p in [p_pre30, p_m1, p_p5, p_p30]): continue
128	    if min(p_pre30, p_m1, p_p5, p_p30) <= 0: continue
129	    pre_ret  = (p_m1 / p_pre30 - 1) * 100
130	    rel_ret  = (p_p5 / p_m1   - 1) * 100
131	    post_ret = (p_p30/ p_p5   - 1) * 100
132	    results.append({
133	        "ticker": tk, "quarter": row["quarter"], "Release_Date": rdt,
134	        "NP_R": row["NP_R"]*100 if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) else np.nan,
135	        "Rev_YoY": row["Revenue_YoY_P0"]*100 if pd.notna(row["Revenue_YoY_P0"]) else np.nan,
136	        "pre_ret": pre_ret, "rel_ret": rel_ret, "post_ret": post_ret,
137	    })
138	
139	evdf = pd.DataFrame(results)
140	print(f"\n  Processed events with full windows: {len(evdf):,}")
141	
142	# ─── 4. Classify pattern per event ───────────────────────────────────────
143	def classify(row):
144	    npr = row["NP_R"]
145	    if pd.isna(npr): return "NO_NPR"
146	    pre, rel, post = row["pre_ret"], row["rel_ret"], row["post_ret"]
147	    good = npr >= 15
148	    bad  = npr <= -15
149	
150	    if good:
151	        if pre >= 10 and rel <= -2:                      return "LEAK_RUNUP_POS"
152	        if abs(pre) < 5 and rel >= 3:                    return "EFFICIENT_POS"
153	        if abs(pre) < 5 and abs(rel) < 3 and post >= 5:  return "LAGGED_POS"
154	        if pre >= 10 and rel >= 0 and post < 0:          return "LEAK_RUNUP_POS"  # variant
155	    if bad:
156	        if pre <= -10 and rel >= 2:                      return "LEAK_DUMP_NEG"
157	        if abs(pre) < 5 and rel <= -3:                   return "EFFICIENT_NEG"
158	        if abs(pre) < 5 and abs(rel) < 3 and post <= -5: return "LAGGED_NEG"
159	    return "NOISE"
160	
161	evdf["pattern"] = evdf.apply(classify, axis=1)
162	print("\n[4] Pattern distribution (all events):")
163	dist = evdf["pattern"].value_counts()
164	for p, n in dist.items():
165	    print(f"  {p:<20}: {n:>6,}  ({n/len(evdf)*100:.1f}%)")
166	
167	# ─── 5. Per-ticker reaction profile ──────────────────────────────────────
168	print("\n[5] Building per-ticker profile (≥8 events)...")
169	prof = evdf.groupby("ticker").agg(
170	    n_events=("ticker","size"),
171	    n_good=("NP_R", lambda x: (x>=15).sum()),
172	    n_bad =("NP_R", lambda x: (x<=-15).sum()),
173	    avg_pre_good =("pre_ret",  lambda x: x[evdf.loc[x.index,"NP_R"]>=15].mean()),
